definitions: A statement of all transactions made between entities in one country and the rest of the world over a defined period of time, such as a quarter or a year.
The difference between the amount of money flowing into a country and the amount flowing out.
examples: The country's balance of payment showed a significant surplus last year.
Economists are concerned about the deficit in the balance of payment.
Policies were implemented to improve the balance of payment.
